title: New Design 6 Ports 100M AI PoE Switch AI Extend 300meter Transmission Distance
description: Model:EW-S1706CFU-AP | The 100M AI Watchdog PoE series switches are unmanaged Ethernet power over Ethernet switches. The maximum output power of the PoE interface of this series of products reaches 30W. | All models in this series are equipped with independent three-position dip switches, which can respectively control the Extend, VLAN and AI Watchdog functions. They can take effect without restarting the power supply, and the operation is convenient and flexible. With its efficient power supply capacity and intelligent functional design, this series of switches is highly suitable for net-work application scenarios that require stable and high-power Ethernet power supply.
features_text: Features： | Extend 300M Long Distance Transmission | In long-distance deployment scenarios, Al expansion can extend a single port to transmit up to300 meters while automatically adjusting the speed (with a speed limit of 10Mbps), and otherports can maintain 100M within 100 meters. | VLAN | In the network, to isolate network access between different departments, prevent virus-infectedPCs from affecting the entire network, virtual local area networks are divided into differentVLANs to isolate broadcast domains and enhance network stability. This also improves networkmanagement efficiency and security. | AI Watchdog | It can automatically detect the operating status of the equipment. When a port failure is detect-ed, it will automatically attempt to restore the connection and restart the abnormal device, there-by reducing maintenance costs and improving system stability, and minimizing manual interven-tion to the greatest extent.

features_text: The EWIND Gigabit AI PoE Switch Series is an unmanaged PoE switch family for flexible deployments. The 4- and 8-port versions support HiPoE 60W on specific ports for high-power devices such as PTZ and speed dome cameras, while the 16- and 24-port models support standard PoE/PoE+ only. All models comply with IEEE 802.3af/at and feature AI Watchdog, VLAN isolation, 300m long-range mode, and port priority to ensure stable and intelligent power delivery. With its efficient power supply capacity and intelligent functional design, this series is ideal for hotels, campuses, factory dormitories, small offices, and medium-sized enterprise networks. | Features | Extend 300M Long Distance Transmission In long-distance deployment scenarios, AI expansion can extend a single port to transmit up to 300 meters while automatically adjusting the speed (with a speed limit of 10Mbps), and other ports can maintain 1000M within 100 meters. | VLAN In the network, to isolate network access between different departments, prevent virus-infected PCs from affecting the entire network, virtual local area networks are divided into different VLANs to isolate broadcast domains and enhance network stability. This also improves network management efficiency and security. | AI Watchdog It can automatically detect the operating status of the equipment. When a port failure is detected, it will automatically attempt to restore the connection and restart the abnormal device, there by reducing maintenance costs and improving system stability, and minimizing manual intervention to the greatest extent. | Port Priority When the power supply is insufficient, intelligent power-off is carried out based on the port number to achieve priority power supply for important equipment .

features_text: This series of products are all gigabit-level L2+managed POE fiber switches. They feature 1000Mbps POE ports and SFP fiber slot ports. The POE power supply capacity of a single port canreach 30 watts. The management function has L2+ full network management capabilities, sup-ports IPV4/IPV6 management, full-line static routing rate forwarding, security protection mecha-nisms, complete ACL/QoS policies and rich VLAN functions, and is easy to manage and maintain.It supports various network redundancy protocols such as STP/RSTP/MSTP(<50 milliseconds)and (ITU-T G.8032)ERPS to enhance link backup and network reliability. When a single-directionnetwork fails, communication can be quickly restored to ensure uninterrupted communication forcritical applications. According to actual application requirements, various application services canbe configured through the network management interface, such as PoE power management, porttraffic control, VLAN partitioning and SNMP, etc.

features_text: This series of products are all gigabit-level L2+managed POE fiber switches. They feature 1000Mbps POE ports and SFP fiber slot ports. The POE power supply capacity of a single port canreach 30 watts. The management function has L2+ full network management capabilities, sup-ports IPV4/IPV6 management, full-line static routing rate forwarding, security protection mecha-nisms, complete ACL/QoS policies and rich VLAN functions, and is easy to manage and maintain.It supports various network redundancy protocols such as STP/RSTP/MSTP(<50 milliseconds)and (ITU-T G.8032)ERPS to enhance link backup and network reliability. When a single-directionnetwork fails, communication can be quickly restored to ensure uninterrupted communication forcritical applications. According to actual application requirements, various application services canbe configured through the network management interface, such as PoE power management, porttraffic control, VLAN partitioning and SNMP, etc.

features_text: Overview | EWIND Cloud Smart PoE Switch Series features an advanced remote online management platform designed to deliver quick responses and versatile capabilities. Key features include PoE scheduling, PoE auto-alive check, port settings, alarm notifications, VLAN configuration, and topology mapping etc. These functionalities enable users to manage their networks with ease, ensuring optimal performance, enhanced productivity, and an improved user experience. With the EWIND Cloud App/Website Platform, users can monitor and maintain their network and security systems anytime, anywhere.

applications_text: Highlights | EWIND Cloud PoE Switches integrate seamlessly with the EWIND Cloud platform / Mobile APP , enabling remote management of your devices through a secure, cloud-based interface. The platform s automatically generates a network topology, allowing you to efficiently monitor and manage your entire CCTV system while quickly identifying network issues in real time. This enhances operational efficiency and significantly simplifies network maintenance. | Topology Management & Remote Maintenance | EWIND Cloud offers a robust, cloud-based service system that provides comprehensive management of on-site devices, ensuring seamless connectivity and offering a full suite of support services. Additionally, the Cloud PoE Switches are equipped with a long-distance PoE functionality, capable of delivering power to devices up to 300 meters away. It is suitable for a variety of applications, including small to medium-sized businesses (SMBs), CCTV security systems, and environments such as homes, factories, and offices.

E：AI Extend 300meters transmission and auto speed change of single port (limit 10Mbps), other ports maintain 1000M within 100 meters; V：Turn on，1-8 Port support each port Isolation & VLAN; D：Turn on，1-8 Port support AI-PoE Network self-healing mode(PoE Watchdog function), Automatic solve the camera problem &reduce after-sale. 3. PoE default: 1, 2(+)/3, 6(-); 4.Switching capacity:9.6Gbps, MAC table:16K; 5.Input volatge:DC48-57V, Redundant dual power 5-bit industrial terminals; 6.IP protectin level:IP40; Rail-type installation. 7.5 years warranty.
features_text: The EW-PIS1712-8FE is a 10/100M industrial PoE fiber switch. It has 8 *10/100 M PoE port s and 2*10/100/1000M RJ45 ports + 2* 100/ 1000M SFP slot ports , P ort 1 -8 can support IEEE 802.3af/at PoE standard, single port PoE power up to 30W, the maximum PoE output power is 120 W (at- 240 W). As a PoE power supply device, it can automatically detect and recognize the power receiving equipment that meets the standard and supply power through the network cable. It can supply power to POE terminal equipment such as wireless AP, webcam, VoIP phone, industrial sensor through network cable, and meet the network environment that needs high-density PoE power supply. It is suitable for intelligent transportation, rail transit, electric power, mining, metallurgy and green energy. Industrial scenes such as construction set up a cost-effective and stable communication network. Unmanaged model, plug and play, no configuration, easy to use. | The EW-PIS1712-8FE is a | 10/100M | industrial | PoE fiber | switch. It can supply power to POE terminal equipment such as wireless AP, webcam, VoIP phone, industrial sensor through network cable, and meet the network environment that needs high-density PoE power supply. It is suitable for intelligent transportation, rail transit, electric power, mining, metallurgy and green energy. Industrial scenes such as construction set up a cost-effective and stable communication network. title: 14 Ports Full Gigabit Layer 2+ Industrial Managed PoE Switch
description: Model:EW-PIS3814M-8GE | 1.8*10/100/1000M RJ45 POE +2*10/100/1000M RJ45 Non POE+4*1000M SFP fiber Port Industrial PoE Switch,1-8 port support IEEE 802.3af/at; 2.PoE port support AF/ATintelligent recognition,Standard power is 15.4W/port, Maximum power :30W/port; 3.Only support 1,2(+)/3,6(-); 4.Support L2+ full network management,PoE network management and configuration; 5.Switching capacity: 256Gbps,MAC table: 32K; 6.Input voltage:DC48-57V,Redundant dual power 5-bit industrial terminals; 7.IP protection level: IP40; 8.Rail-type installation. 9.5 years warranty
features_text: This series of products are all gigabit-level L2+ managed POE fiber switches. They feature 1000Mbps POE ports and SFP fiber slot ports. The POE power supply capacity of a single port canreach 30 watts. The management function has L2+ full network management capabilities, sup-ports IPV4/IPV6 management, full-line static routing rate forwarding, security protection mecha-nisms, complete ACL/QoS policies and rich VLAN functions, and is easy to manage and maintain.It supports various network redundancy protocols such as STP/RSTP/MSTP (<50 milliseconds)and (ITU-T G.8032) ERPS to enhance link backup and network reliability. When a single-directionnetwork fails, communication can be quickly restored to ensure uninterrupted communication forcritical applications. According to actual application requirements, various application services canbe configured through the network management interface, such as PoE power management, porttraffic control, VLAN partitioning and SNMP, etc.

description: 1.8*10/100/1000M RJ45 PoE ports+ 2*10/100/1000M RJ45 Non PoE ports + 4*100/1000M SFP fiber slot ports; 2. PoE port support AF/AT/BT intelligent recognition,Standard power is 90W/port, Maximum power :95W/port;With PoE isolation from the rest(Signal isolation, port isolation, power isolation); 3.Only support 1,2(+)/3,6(-); 4.Support L2+ full network management,PoE network management and configuration; 5.Switching capacity: 256Gbps,MAC table: 32K; 6.Input voltage:DC48-57V,Redundant dual power 5-bit industrial terminals; 7.IP protection level: IP40; 8.Rail-type installation. 9.5 years warranty
features_text: The EW-PIS3814M-8GE -BT is a full Gigabit managed industrial PoE switch. it has 8*10/100/1000M PoE ports and 2*10/100/1000M RJ45 ports and 4*100/1000M SFP fiber slot ports , port 1-8 can supports IEEE 802.3af/at /bt standard POE power supply, single port POE power up to 9 0W, and the maximum POE output power is 120W (at-240W). As a POE power supply device, it can automatically detect and identify the electrical equipment that meets the standard and supply power through the cable. It can supply the POE terminal equipment, such as wireless AP, network camera, network telephone, industrial sensor and so on, to meet the demand for high density PoE power supply network environment. It is suitable for intelligent transportation, rail transportation, electric power industry, mining, metallurgy and green energy construction and so on. A reliable communication networks. Managed model supports a variety of network redundancy protocol STP/RSTP/MSTP (<50ms). When one-way network fails, communication can be recovered quickly to ensure uninterrupted communication of important applications. IPS33148PFM industrial series products fully follow industrial product design and material. The shell adopts aluminum alloy to enhance heat dissipation efficiency, IP40 protection grade, and ensures the stable operation of the equipment in bad environment. According to the actual application needs, through Web, CLI, SNMP network management, POE power supply management, port flow control, VLAN division, STP, RSTP and other functions of the application service configuration. | The EW-PIS3814M-8GE | is a full Gigabit managed industrial PoE switch. it has 8*10/100/1000M PoE ports and 2*10/100/1000M RJ45 ports and 4*100/1000M SFP fiber slot ports , port 1-8 can supports IEEE 802.3af/at | standard POE power supply, single port POE power up to | 0W, and the maximum POE output power is 120W (at-240W). As a POE power supply device, it can automatically detect and identify the electrical equipment that meets the standard and supply power through the cable. It can supply the POE terminal equipment, such as wireless AP, network camera, network telephone, industrial sensor and so on, to meet the demand for high density PoE power supply network environment. It is suitable for intelligent transportation, rail transportation, electric power industry, mining, metallurgy and green energy construction and so on. A reliable communication networks. | Managed model supports a variety of network redundancy protocol STP/RSTP/MSTP (<50ms). When one-way network fails, communication can be recovered quickly to ensure uninterrupted communication of important applications. IPS33148PFM industrial series products fully follow industrial product design and material. The shell adopts aluminum alloy to enhance heat dissipation efficiency, IP40 protection grade, and ensures the stable operation of the equipment in bad environment. According to the actual application needs, through Web, CLI, SNMP network management, POE power supply management, port flow control, VLAN division, STP, RSTP and other functions of the application service configuration.

description: Model:EW-PIS5812M-8GE | 1.Managed 8*10/100/1000M+4*10G SFP fiber Port Industrial PoE Switch,1-8 port support IEEE 802.3af/at; 2.PoE port support AF/ATintelligent recognition,Standard power is 15.4W/port, Maximum power :30W/port; 3.Only support 1,2(+)/3,6(-); 4.Support L2+ full network management,PoE network management and configuration; 5.Switching capacity: 598Gbps,MAC table: 32K; 6.Input voltage:DC48-57V,Redundant dual power 5-bit industrial terminals; 7.IP protection level: IP40; 8.Rail-type installation. 9.5 years warranty

specs.Interface: 8*10/100/1000Base-T PoE ports (Data/Power) 4*10G uplink SFP + slot ports (Data) 1 * RS232 console port(115200, N,8,1) 2 set of V+, V- redundant DC power interface ( 4 Pin Phoenix terminal) Single-pole double throw switch (FAULT)
specs.Network Protocol: IEEE802.3 10BASE-T; IEEE802.3i 10Base-T; IEEE802.3u 100Base-TX; IEEE802.3ab 1000Base-T; IEEE802.3z 1000Base-X; IEEE802.3ae 10GBase-X; IEEE802.3x
specs.Ethernet Port Feature: 10/100/1000Base-T, Auto-sensing,Full/half duplex MDI/MDI-X self-adaption
specs.SFP Port Characteristic: Gigabit SFP /10G SFP+ optical fiber interface, default matching optical modules (optional order single-mode / multi-mode, single fiber / dual fiber optical module. LC)
specs.Twisted Pair Transmission: 10BASE-T: Cat3,4,5 UTP (≤100 meter) 100BASE-TX: Cat5 or later UTP (≤100 meter) 1000BASE-T: Cat5e or later UTP (≤100 meter)
specs.Working Voltage: 48-57VDC; 6 Pin industrial Phoenix terminal, support anti-reverse protection.
specs.LED Indicator: Power indicator: PWR ( Green ); Network indicator: 1- 8 (Link/Act)/ ( Orange ), 9-12 (Link/Act)/ ( Green ); POE indicator: PoE ( Green )
specs.Power Supply: No, optional 48V/120W or 48V/240W industrial power supply
specs.Lightning protection / protection level: Lightning protection: 6KV 8/20us; Protection level: IP40 IEC61000-4-2(ESD): ±8kV contact discharge, ±15kV air discharge IEC61000-4-3(RS):10V/m(80~1000MHz) IEC61000-4-4(EFT): power cable: ±4kV; data cable: ±2kV IEC61000-4-5(Surge): power cable:CM±4kV/DM±2kV; data cable: ±4kV IEC61000-4-6(radio frequency transmission):10V(150kHz~80MHz) IEC61000-4-8(power frequency magnetic field):100A/m;1000A/m ,1s to 3s IEC61000-4-9(pulsed magnet field):1000A/m IEC61000-4-10(damped oscillation):30A/m 1MHz IEC61000-4-12/18(shockwave):CM 2.5kV, DM 1kV IEC61000-4-16(common-mode transmission):30V; 300V,1s FCC Part 15/CISPR22(EN55022): Class B IEC61000-6-2(Common Industrial Standard)

specs.Port: Support IEEE802.3x flow control (full duplex) Support for broadcast storm suppression based on port rate support speed limit for incoming and offline message traffic, with a minimum particle size of 64Kbps. Support port temperature protection settings Support port EEE green Ethernet energy saving configuration
specs.PoE Management: Support total power limit configuration for POE power supply Support PoE output power allocation per port, close / start af/at Support PoE output priority configuration per port Support PoE work status per port display Support power delay start Support PoE work and time scheduling
specs.Layer 3 Function: L2+ Network management IPV4/IPV6 management L3 soft routing forwarding, Static route, Default route @ 128 pcs, APR @ 1024 pcs
specs.VLAN: 4K VLAN based on port, IEEE802.1q VLAN based on the protocol VLAN based on MAC Voice VLAN, QinQ configuration Port configuration of Access, Trunk, Hybrid
specs.Port Aggregation: LACP, Static aggregation Max 7 aggregation groups and 8 ports per group
specs.Industrial Ring Network Protocol: G.8032 (ERPS), Recovery time less than 20ms 255 Ring at most, Max 1024 devices per ring.
specs.Multicast: IGMP Snooping v1/v2/v3, Max 1024 multicast groups, Fast log out MLD Snooping v1/v2, Multicast VLAN
specs.Mirror: Bi-directional traffic mirroring supporting the basic port
specs.QoS: Support Diff-Serv QoS Each port supports 8 output queues Support 802.1p/DSCP priority mapping Support queue scheduling mechanism (SP, WRR, SP+WRR) Support priority tag Mark/Remark Support stream-based packet filtering Support for stream-based redirection Support flow-based speed limit
specs.ACL: Support L2 to L4 packet filtering function, can match the first 80 bytes of the message, provide based on the source MAC address, destination MAC address, source IP address, destination IP address, IP protocol type, TCP/UDP port, TCP/UDP port range, VLAN and other definition ACL. Support ACL based on port and VLAN
specs.Safety Characteristics: Support user grading management and password protection Support IEEE802.1X authentication / centralized MAC address authentication Support AAA&RADIUS authentication Support the number of MAC address learning restrictions Support MAC address black hole Support SSH 2 .0 to provide secure passwords for user login. Support SSL to ensure data transmission security Support port isolation Support the speed limit function of ARP message Support IP source address protection Support ARP intrusion detection function Support against DoS attacks Support port broadcast message suppression Support host data backup mechanism Binding capabilities of IP+MAC+VLAN+ ports
specs.DHCP: Support DHCP Client Support DHCP Snooping Support DHCP Serve Support DHCP Relay
specs.Management and Maintenance: Support Console/AUX Modem/Telnet/SSH2.0 CLI command line configuration Support WEB network management (HTTPS) Support FTP, TFTP, Xmodem, SFTP file download management Support SNMP V1/V2C/V3 Support one bond reduction Support NTP clock Support system work log Support Ping detection Support cable state detection Support CPU instant utilization status view Support link layer discovery protocol LLDP Support NMS i ntelligent m anagement c enter
specs.System Requirements: Web browser: Mozilla Firefox 2.5 or higher, Google browser chrome V42 or higher, Microsoft Internet Explorer10 or later; Cat5e or later Ethernet cable; TCP/ IP, network adapter and network operating system ( Microsoft Windows, Linux, or Mac OS X ) installed on every computer in the network.

As a POE power supply device, it can automatically detect and identify the electrical equipment that meets the standard and supply power through the cable. It can supply the POE terminal equipment, such as wireless AP, network camera, network telephone, industrial sensor and so on, to meet the demand for high density PoE power supply network environment. It is suitable for intelligent transportation, rail transportation, electric power industry, mining, metallurgy and green energy construction and so on. A reliable communication networks. Managed model supports a variety of network redundancy protocol STP/RSTP/MSTP (<50ms). When one-way network fails, communication can be recovered quickly to ensure uninterrupted communication of important applications. industrial series products fully follow industrial product design and material. The shell adopts aluminum alloy to enhance heat dissipation efficiency, IP40 protection grade, and ensures the stable operation of the equipment in bad environment. title: 2.5G/10G 24-Port 100/1000/2500Mbps Unmanaged Ethernet Switch
description: Model:EW-S6826 | 1.24×2.5G RJ45 Port+ 2 Uplink 10G SFP+ Fiber Port; 2.Exchange capacity: 160Gbps,MAC table: 16k; 3.Support Port Surge Protection: 6KV,ESD Air 8KV; 4.12V4A external power supply;
features_text: Overview | The 2.5G series of unmanaged multi-Gigabit network switches is designed to provide high-speed connectivity up to 2.5Gbps for small and medium-sized networks, including home offices, school dormitories, offices, and small-scale surveillance systems. Featuring a large-capacity cache chip and full-port support for wire-speed forwarding, it ensures stable, uninterrupted video and data transmission 24/7, making it an ideal solution for environments that demand reliable performance. | Highlights | These switches are easy to set up with no configuration required. They are desktop and wall-mountable, and feature auto MDI/MDIX for seamless connection without the need for crossover cables. Each port automatically negotiates the appropriate speed (100/1000/2500Mbps) to ensure compatibility and optimal performance. | Ideal for home offices and small-to-medium businesses that need reliable, high-speed multi-Gigabit networking, these plug-and-play switches offer hassle-free setup and efficient performance. | Specifications

features_text: Overview | The 2.5G series of unmanaged multi-Gigabit network switches is designed to provide high-speed connectivity up to 2.5Gbps for small and medium-sized networks, including home offices, school dormitories, offices, and small-scale surveillance systems. Featuring a large-capacity cache chip and full-port support for wire-speed forwarding, it ensures stable, uninterrupted video and data transmission 24/7, making it an ideal solution for environments that demand reliable performance. | Highlights | These switches are easy to set up with no configuration required. They are desktop and wall-mountable, and feature auto MDI/MDIX for seamless connection without the need for crossover cables. Each port automatically negotiates the appropriate speed (100/1000/2500Mbps) to ensure compatibility and optimal performance. | Ideal for home offices and small-to-medium businesses that need reliable, high-speed multi-Gigabit networking, these plug-and-play switches offer hassle-free setup and efficient performance. | Specifications
